languages.text:
Страница чьего-то дневника была аккуратно отрезана и реставрирована.{br}
"...Но то, что я встретил на этом забытом комке грязи... Когда мы прибыли, корабельные ауспики обнаружили наличие каких-то руин. Заинтригованный, я со свитой спустился на поверхность мертвого мира. Какой вызов Галактика приготовила мне на сей раз? Какое свершение я могу сделать во имя Его и династии? Какие сокровища ждут, чтобы послужить Человечеству и фон Валанциусам? Таких построек я еще не видал. Матово-черные, полированные обелиски, исписанные светящимися зелеными глифами незнакомого мне языка. Даже мой незаменимый савант-лингвист лишь смущенно разводил руками. Очарованный пугающей красотой руин, почтенный эксплоратор коснулся обелиска – и тогда появилось оно. Это существо… доселе не видал я ничего подобного, что само по себе удивительно. Словно кто-то облил металлом человеческий скелет и заставил его двигаться. Я вздрагиваю, вспоминая чудище. Оно не понимало команд на готике, и даже технопровидец не смог достучаться до твари ни одним наречием технолингвы. Наивные, мы еще думали, что это создание – редкий вид сервитора или автоматона. Единственное, что извергали его вокс-синтезаторы – "йагхмарт". Бог-Император милостивый, только волей Его я вернулся на флагман. Техножрец, да примет его Владыка Человечества, пытался и взломать его, и остановить своими техночудесами – все тщетно. Я видел, как один за другим гибли мои верные слуги. Я помню леденящий ужас от осознания беспомощности. Словно я смотрел на приближающийся рок, и его металлический череп предвещал мою гибель. Но я – Вольный Торговец. Я – Себериан фон Валанциус! По завету Бога-Императора и по воле Его – мой долг бросать вызов неизвестному и склонять Галактику перед Золотым Троном. И вот когда с лязгом тварь рухнула на пол, случилась ересь высшего порядка. Конструкт попросту исчез в зеленой вспышке, лишив меня законного права взять трофей. Это меня истинно расстроило, даже больше потери ближайших слуг..."
languages.translation_comment:
[регион] – когда станет ясно, на каком мире
Предок стырил артефакт, вставить сюда
название того самого региона (Звёзды
Язычников, Проклятые Владения и т.д.).
Это будет хлебной крошкой к посещению планеты (как упоминание йекхмет – к 5 главе и участии династии в ДЛЦ).
Получение предмета поднимает ReadAncestryDiary
[Предок] – предлагаю дать имя с отсылкой
к известному путешественнику или
исследователю. Что-то типа Маркос, Витта
м фон Валанциус и т.п.

languages.text:
This page from someone's diary has been neatly cut out and restored.{br}
"...But that which I encountered on this forgotten lump of dirt... When we arrived, the ship's auspexes revealed the presence of some kind of ruins. Intrigued, my retinue and I descended to the surface of the dead world. What challenge had the galaxy prepared for me this time? What grand deed might I perform in His name and the name of the dynasty? What treasures awaited me, ready to serve Humanity and House von Valancius? Never before had I set eyes upon such buildings. Matte-black, polished obelisks, inscribed with glowing green glyphs of a language unknown to me. Even my indispensable linguist savant could only throw up his hands in bafflement. Beguiled by the ruins' forbidding beauty, the esteemed Explorator touched one of the obelisks — and then it appeared. The creature... I had never seen the like of it before, a startling fact in and of itself. It was as if someone had dipped a human skeleton in molten metal and then compelled it to move. I shudder to recall that monster. It did not understand commands in Gothic, nor could my Enginseer manage to communicate with the thing in any of the Techna-Lingua dialects. We thought, naively, that the creature was a rare kind of servitor or automaton. The only thing disgorged by its vox-synths was "yergmek." Merciful God-Emperor, it was only by His will that I returned to the flagship. The Tech-Priest, may the Master of Mankind receive him, tried both to seize control of the creature's governing systems and to stop it with his tech-miracles — all in vain. I watched as my faithful servants perished one by one. I remember the chilling horror that crept over me as I realised my helplessness. As if I were watching doom itself draw nearer and nearer, its metal skull heralding my destruction. But I am a Rogue Trader. I am Seberian von Valancius! By the God-Emperor's covenant and by His will, it is my duty to brave the unknown and to subjugate the Galaxy to the Golden Throne. And when the thing crashed to the floor with a clang, it was followed by heresy of the highest order. The construct simply vanished in a flash of green, robbing me of my lawful right to claim the trophy. That was the truly devastating loss, even more so than the loss of my closest servants..."

languages.text: このページは誰かの日記から切り抜かれて修復されたものだ。{br}"...しかし、この忘れられた土の塊で出会ったものとは...。我々が到着した時、船の偵察装置は何か遺跡の存在を示した。興味を持った我と従者たちは死の世界の表面に降り立った。銀河が我々に用意した試練とは何か？神の名と王家の名の下で我々はどんな偉業を成し遂げられるのか？人類とフォン・ヴァランキウス家のために待っている宝とは何か？これほど壮大な建造物は見たことがなかった。黒く光る緑色の文字が刻まれた、黒く光る柱。我々の言語を解読する専門家ですら、困惑した顔をした。恐ろしい美しさに魅了された、名高い探検家である我は柱に触れた。そして、それは現れた。その生き物...。我々は見たことがない。それはまるで、人間の骨を溶けた金属に浸して動かせるようにしたようなものだった。その怪物を思い出すだけで、震える。ゴシック語で命令を理解することはできず、我々の技術者たちはテクナ・リンガのあらゆる方言でその生き物とコミュニケーションを取ろうとしたが、無駄だった。我々は、その生き物が珍しい種類の奴隷や自動人形だと、無邪気に思っていた。その声合成装置から発せられた唯一の言葉は「イェルグメック」だった。慈悲深い神皇帝よ、我々が旗艦に帰還できたのは、御意志によるものだった。機械聖職者、人類の主が彼を祝福するであろう、その聖職者はその生き物の制御システムを掌握しようと、テクノロジーの奇跡で止めるようと試みたが、無駄だった。我の忠実な従者たちが次々と死んでいくのを見ていた。無力さに気づいた時の恐怖を覚えている。まるで、滅亡そのものが近づいてくるのを見るようなものだった。その金属の頭蓋骨が、我の破壊を告げている。しかし、私はローグ・トレーダーだ。私はシベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウスだ！神皇帝の契約と御意志によって、未知の世界に立ち向かい、銀河を黄金の王座に服従させるのが、私の義務だ。そして、その生き物が金属の床に激突した時、それは最高位の異端の兆候だった。その生き物は緑色の光と共に消え、我の正当な権利を奪った。それは、最も悲惨な損失だった。最も近い従者を失ったことよりもだ..."

languages.text:
Birinin günlüğünden alınan bu sayfa, özenle kesilmiş ve restore edilmiş.{br}
"Fakat bu unutulmuş toprak parçasında karşılaştığım şey... Vardığımızda geminin uzgörenleri, bir tür harabenin varlığını ortaya çıkardı. Bu durum ilgimizi çekti. Maiyetim ve ben, ölü dünyasının yüzeyine indik. Galaksi bu sefer benim için ne gibi bir zorluk hazırlamıştı? O'nun ve hanedanlığın adına hangi büyük eylemi gerçekleştirebilecektim? İnsanlığa ve von Valancius Hanesi'ne hizmet etmeye hazır hangi hazineler beni bekliyordu? Daha önce hiç böyle yapılar görmemiştim. Mat siyah, cilalı dikili taşlar, bana yabancı bir dilde parlayan yeşil gliflerle yazılmıştı. Vazgeçilmez dil bilimci âlimim bile şaşkınlık içinde ellerini havaya kaldırmaktan başka bir şey yapamadı. Harabelerin tekinsiz güzelliğine kapılan saygıdeğer Keşiftör, dikili taşlardan birine dokundu... Sonra o belirdi. Yaratık... Daha önce hiç böylesini görmemiştim ki bu bile başlı başına şaşırtıcı bir durumdu. Sanki biri, bir insan iskeletini erimiş metale batırmış ve sonra hareket etmeye zorlamış gibiydi. O canavarı hatırladıkça ürperiyorum. Ne Gotik dilindeki emirleri anlıyordu ne de mühedyumum o şeyle Lingua Techna lehçelerinden biriyle iletişim kurabilmişti. Safça, yaratığın nadir bir tür hizmetör veya otomaton olduğunu düşündük. Voks sentezleyicilerden dökülen tek şey "yergmek" ifadesi idi. Ancak merhametli Tanrı İmparator'un iradesiyle sancak gemisine dönebildim. Tekno Rahip, hem yaratığın yönetim sistemlerinin kontrolünü ele geçirmeye hem de tekno mucizeleriyle onu durdurmaya çalıştı. Hepsi nafileydi. İnsanlığın Efendisi onu huzuruna kabul etsin... Sadık hizmetkârlarımın birer birer yok oluşunu izledim. Çaresizliğimi fark ettiğimde içime çöken o ürpertici dehşeti hatırlıyorum. Sanki kıyametin giderek yaklaştığını, metal kafatasının yıkımımı haber verdiğini izliyordum. Ancak ben Hür Tacir'im. Ben Seberian von Valancius'um! Tanrı İmparator'un ahdi ve iradesiyle, bilinmeyene göğüs germek ve Galaksi'yi Altın Taht'a boyun eğdirmek benim vazifem. O şey büyük bir çınlamayla yere yığıldığında, bunu çok büyük bir kâfirlik izledi. Yapı, yeşil bir parıltı içinde yok oldu ve beni yasal hakkım olan ganimetten mahrum bıraktı. Gerçekten yıkıcı kayıp buydu, en yakın hizmetkârlarımın kaybından bile daha yıkıcı..."
languages.original_text:
This page from someone's diary has been neatly cut out and restored.{br}
"...But that which I encountered on this forgotten lump of dirt... When we arrived, the ship's auspexes revealed the presence of some kind of ruins. Intrigued, my retinue and I descended to the surface of the dead world. What challenge had the galaxy prepared for me this time? What grand deed might I perform in His name and the name of the dynasty? What treasures awaited me, ready to serve Humanity and House von Valancius? Never before had I set eyes upon such buildings. Matte-black, polished obelisks, inscribed with glowing green glyphs of a language unknown to me. Even my indispensable linguist savant could only throw up his hands in bafflement. Beguiled by the ruins' forbidding beauty, the esteemed Explorator touched one of the obelisks — and then it appeared. The creature... I had never seen the like of it before, a startling fact in and of itself. It was as if someone had dipped a human skeleton in molten metal and then compelled it to move. I shudder to recall that monster. It did not understand commands in Gothic, nor could my Enginseer manage to communicate with the thing in any of the Techna-Lingua dialects. We thought, naively, that the creature was a rare kind of servitor or automaton. The only thing disgorged by its vox-synths was "yergmek." Merciful God-Emperor, it was only by His will that I returned to the flagship. The Tech-Priest, may the Master of Mankind receive him, tried both to seize control of the creature's governing systems and to stop it with his tech-miracles — all in vain. I watched as my faithful servants perished one by one. I remember the chilling horror that crept over me as I realised my helplessness. As if I were watching doom itself draw nearer and nearer, its metal skull heralding my destruction. But I am a Rogue Trader. I am Seberian von Valancius! By the God-Emperor's covenant and by His will, it is my duty to brave the unknown and to subjugate the Galaxy to the Golden Throne. And when the thing crashed to the floor with a clang, it was followed by heresy of the highest order. The construct simply vanished in a flash of green, robbing me of my lawful right to claim the trophy. That was the truly devastating loss, even more so than the loss of my closest servants..."

traits.locale_text:
Birinin günlüğünden alınan bu sayfa, özenle kesilmiş ve restore edilmiş.{br}
"Fakat bu unutulmuş toprak parçasında karşılaştığım şey... Vardığımızda geminin uzgörenleri, bir tür harabenin varlığını ortaya çıkardı. Bu durum ilgimizi çekti. Maiyetim ve ben, ölüm dünyasının yüzeyine indik. Galaksi bu sefer benim için ne gibi bir zorluk hazırlamıştı? O'nun ve hanedanlığın adına hangi büyük eylemi gerçekleştirebilecektim? İnsanlığa ve von Valancius Hanesi'ne hizmet etmeye hazır hangi hazineler beni bekliyordu? Daha önce hiç böyle yapılar görmemiştim. Mat siyah, cilalı dikili taşlar, bana yabancı bir dilde parlayan yeşil gliflerle yazılmıştı. Vazgeçilmez dil bilimci âlimim bile şaşkınlık içinde ellerini havaya kaldırmaktan başka bir şey yapamadı. Harabelerin tekinsiz güzelliğine kapılan saygıdeğer Keşiftör, dikili taşlardan birine dokundu... Sonra o belirdi. Yaratık... Daha önce hiç böylesini görmemiştim ki bu bile başlı başına şaşırtıcı bir durumdu. Sanki biri, bir insan iskeletini erimiş metale batırmış ve sonra hareket etmeye zorlamış gibiydi. O canavarı hatırladıkça ürperiyorum. Ne Gotik dilindeki emirleri anlıyordu ne de mühedyumum o şeyle Lingua Techna lehçelerinden biriyle iletişim kurabilmişti. Safça, yaratığın nadir bir tür hizmetör veya otomaton olduğunu düşündük. Voks sentezleyicilerden dökülen tek şey "yergmek" ifadesi idi. Ancak merhametli Tanrı İmparator'un iradesiyle sancak gemisine dönebildim. Tekno Rahip, hem yaratığın yönetim sistemlerinin kontrolünü ele geçirmeye hem de tekno mucizeleriyle onu durdurmaya çalıştı. Hepsi nafileydi. İnsanlığın Efendisi onu huzuruna kabul etsin... Sadık hizmetkârlarımın birer birer yok oluşunu izledim. Çaresizliğimi fark ettiğimde içime çöken o ürpertici dehşeti hatırlıyorum. Sanki kıyametin giderek yaklaştığını, metal kafatasının yıkımımı haber verdiğini izliyordum. Ancak ben Hür Tacir'im. Ben Seberian von Valancius'um! Tanrı İmparator'un ahdi ve iradesiyle, bilinmeyene göğüs germek ve Galaksi'yi Altın Taht'a boyun eğdirmek benim vazifem. O şey büyük bir çınlamayla yere yığıldığında, bunu çok büyük bir kâfirlik izledi. Yapı, yeşil bir parıltı içinde yok oldu ve beni yasal hakkım olan ganimetten mahrum bıraktı. Gerçekten yıkıcı kayıp buydu, en yakın hizmetkârlarımın kaybından bile daha yıkıcı..."

languages.text:
Esta página de un diario personal ha sido meticulosamente arrancada y restaurada.{br}
«... pero lo que encontré en aquel olvidado pedazo de tierra... Cuando llegamos, los áuspex de la nave revelaron la presencia de unas ruinas. Intrigados, mi séquito y yo descendimos a la superficie de mundo muerto. ¿Qué nuevo desafío me deparaba la galaxia aquella vez? ¿Qué grandiosa gesta podría llevar a cabo en Su nombre y en el de la dinastía? ¿Qué tesoros me aguardaban, listos para servir a la Humanidad y a la casa von Valancius? Nunca antes había visto edificaciones como aquellas. Obeliscos negros y sin brillo, de superficie pulida e inscritos con glifos verdes brillantes en un idioma que me resultaba desconocido. Ni siquiera mi indispensable sabio lingüista pudo hacer otra cosa que encogerse de hombros. Arrobado por la imponente belleza de las ruinas, el estimado explorador tocó uno de los obeliscos... y entonces apareció. Aquella criatura... nunca antes había visto nada igual, lo cual ya era sorprendente de por sí. Era como si alguien hubiera sumergido un esqueleto humano en metal fundido y luego lo conminase a moverse. Me estremezco al recordarlo. La criatura no parecía entender el gótico, y mi visioingeniero fue incapaz de comunicarse con ella en ninguno de los dialectos de la tecnolingua. Fuimos ingenuos al pensar que se trataba de un tipo inusual de servidor o autómata. Lo único que emitían sus sintetizadores de voz era la palabra "yergmek". Solo por la misericordiosa voluntad del Dios Emperador logré regresar con vida a la nave insignia. El tecnosacerdote, que el Señor de la Humanidad lo tenga en su gloria, intentó tomar el control de los sistemas de la criatura y detenerla con sus tecnomilagros, pero fue en vano. Observé cómo mis fieles sirvientes perecían uno tras otro. Recuerdo el escalofriante horror que me invadió al ser consciente de mi impotencia. Era como si estuviera viendo acercarse a mi perdición, con su cráneo metálico augurando mi propio fin. Pero soy un comerciante Independiente. ¡Soy Seberian von Valancius! Por la gloria del Dios Emperador y por Su voluntad, es mi obligación enfrentarme a lo desconocido y subyugar la galaxia en nombre del Trono Dorado. Y, cuando la criatura cayó al suelo con estrépito, la herejía del más alto orden la siguió: el constructo se desintegró con un fogonazo verde, privándome de mi derecho legítimo a reclamar mi trofeo. Aquella fue la auténtica y la más devastadora pérdida, mayor incluso que la de mis leales sirvientes...».

languages.text:
这一页来自某人的私人日记，被整齐地裁下并重新修复装订。{br}
“……然而，我在这颗被遗忘的荒芜星球上所遭遇的一切……当我们抵达时，舰船的鸟卜仪显示存在某种遗迹。怀着好奇，我与随从降落在了这个死亡世界的表面。银河这次为我准备了怎样的考验？我将以神皇与王朝之名，成就何等伟业？又有怎样的宝藏正等待着我，等待着为人类与冯·瓦兰修斯家族效力？我从未见过这样的建筑。漆黑如夜、光洁如新的方尖碑，其上铭刻着散发幽绿光芒的符号——那是一种我从未见过的语言。即便是我那不可或缺的语言学者，也只能困惑地摊手放弃。被遗迹令人敬畏的美所迷惑，那位尊贵的开拓者触摸了其中一座方尖碑——随后，它出现了。那生物……我从未见过类似之物，这本身就足够骇人了。仿佛有人将一具人类骷髅浸入熔融金属之中，然后又强迫它活动起来。回想起那怪物，我至今仍不寒而栗。它听不懂哥特语的指令，我的引擎先知也无法用任意一种科技之语与之沟通。我们天真地以为，它是某种罕见的伺服机仆或自动仆从。它的音阵合成器里唯一吐出的，只有一个词——“耶格梅克”。仁慈的神皇啊，我能返回旗舰，全凭祂的意志。那位技术神甫——愿人类之主接纳他的灵魂——试图夺取那生物控制系统的掌控权，并以技术奇迹阻止它，但全然徒劳。我眼睁睁看着我忠实的仆从一个接一个地死去。当我意识到自身的无助之时，一股彻骨的恐惧逐渐蔓延全身。仿佛我正目睹末日本身逐渐逼近，而那金属骷髅便宣告着我的终结。然而，我是一名行商浪人，我是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯！凭神皇之圣约与祂的意志，我的使命便是直面未知、为黄金王座征服整个银河。当那东西轰然倒地，发出金属撞击的巨响，随之而来的却是最高等级的异端景象。那个构装体在一道绿光中凭空消失，剥夺了我合法获取战利品的权利。这，才是真正毁灭性的损失——甚至比我失去最亲近的仆从更甚……”
languages.original_text:
This page from someone's diary has been neatly cut out and restored.{br}

这一页来自某人的私人日记，被整齐地裁下并重新修复装订。{br}
“……然而，我在这颗被遗忘的荒芜星球上所遭遇的一切……当我们抵达时，舰船的鸟卜仪显示存在某种遗迹。怀着好奇，我与随从降落在了这个死亡世界的表面。银河这次为我准备了怎样的考验？我将以神皇与王朝之名，成就何等伟业？又有怎样的宝藏正等待着我，等待着为人类与冯·瓦兰修斯家族效力？我从未见过这样的建筑。漆黑如夜、光洁如新的方尖碑，其上铭刻着散发幽绿光芒的符号——那是一种我从未见过的语言。即便是我那不可或缺的语言学者，也只能困惑地摊手放弃。被遗迹令人敬畏的美所迷惑，那位尊贵的开拓者触摸了其中一座方尖碑——随后，它出现了。那生物……我从未见过类似之物，这本身就足够骇人了。仿佛有人将一具人类骷髅浸入熔融金属之中，然后又强迫它活动起来。回想起那怪物，我至今仍不寒而栗。它听不懂哥特语的指令，我的引擎先知也无法用任意一种科技之语与之沟通。我们天真地以为，它是某种罕见的伺服机仆或自动仆从。它的音阵合成器里唯一吐出的，只有一个词——“耶格梅克”。仁慈的神皇啊，我能返回旗舰，全凭祂的意志。那位技术神甫——愿人类之主接纳他的灵魂——试图夺取那生物控制系统的掌控权，并以技术奇迹阻止它，但全然徒劳。我眼睁睁看着我忠实的仆从一个接一个地死去。当我意识到自身的无助之时，一股彻骨的恐惧逐渐蔓延全身。仿佛我正目睹末日本身逐渐逼近，而那金属骷髅便宣告着我的终结。然而，我是一名行商浪人，我是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯！凭神皇之圣约与祂的意志，我的使命便是直面未知、为黄金王座征服整个银河。当那东西轰然倒地，发出金属撞击的巨响，随之而来的却是最高等级的异端景象。那个构装体在一道绿光中凭空消失，剥夺了我合法获取战利品的权利。这，才是真正毁灭性的损失——甚至比我失去最亲近的仆从更甚……”

languages.text:
Cette page extraite d'un journal a été soigneusement découpée et restaurée.{br}
« Mais ce que j'ai découvert sur cet amas de poussière oublié de tous... À notre arrivée, les auspex du vaisseau ont détecté la présence de ruines non identifiées. Intrigués, mon entourage et moi-même sommes descendus à la surface de ce monde mort. Quel défi la galaxie me réservait-elle cette fois-ci ? Quel noble exploit pourrais-je accomplir en Son nom et en celui de la dynastie ? Quels trésors m'attendaient, prêts à servir l'humanité et la maison von Valancius ? Jamais encore je n'avais posé les yeux sur de tels édifices. Des obélisques d'un noir mat à la surface parfaitement lisse, gravés de glyphes phosphorescents dans une langue qui m'était inconnue. Même mon indispensable expert en linguistique en est resté sans voix. Envoûté par la beauté menaçante des ruines, l'honorable Explorator a touché l'un des monolithes, et c'est alors qu'elle est apparue. La créature... Un spécimen tel que je n'en avais jamais vu de toute ma vie, et ce n'est pas peu dire. On aurait cru que quelqu'un avait trempé un squelette humain dans du métal en fusion avant de le forcer à se mouvoir. Je frémis au seul souvenir de ce monstre. Il ne comprenait pas les ordres en gothique, pas plus que les nombreux dialectes de la Techna-Lingua employés par mon technaugure. Nous avons naïvement cru qu'il s'agissait d'un modèle rare de servitor ou d'automate. "Yergmek", tel était le seul mot proféré par ses synthétiseurs-vox. C'est uniquement grâce à la volonté de notre miséricordieux Empereur-Dieu que j'ai pu regagner vivant le vaisseau amiral. Le technoprêtre, le Maître de l'Humanité ait son âme, a vainement tenté de prendre le contrôle des systèmes principaux de la créature et de l'arrêter à l'aide de ses miracles technologiques. J'ai assisté impuissant à la mort de tous mes fidèles serviteurs. Je me souviens encore du frisson d'horreur qui m'a saisi quand j'ai compris à quel point j'étais démuni. Comme si je regardais la mort se rapprocher lentement mais sûrement, son crâne de métal annonçant ma destruction imminente. Sauf que je suis un libre-marchand. L'auguste représentant de la maison von Valancius ! Par la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu et le pacte qui nous lie, il m'incombe de braver l'inconnu et de soumettre la galaxie tout entière à l'autorité du Trône d'Or. Plus tard, quand la chose s'est effondrée dans un fracas assourdissant, j'ai été le témoin et la victime d'une hérésie de la pire espèce. L'automate s'est volatilisé dans un éclair de lumière verte, me privant de mon droit légitime à récupérer ce trophée arraché de haute lutte. Ce fut pour moi une perte plus tragique encore que celle de mes plus proches serviteurs... »

Intrigued, my retinue and I descended to the surface of the dead world. What challenge had the galaxy prepared for me this time? What grand deed might I perform in His name and the name of the dynasty? What treasures awaited me, ready to serve Humanity and House von Valancius? Never before had I set eyes upon such buildings. Matte-black, polished obelisks, inscribed with glowing green glyphs of a language unknown to me. Even my indispensable linguist savant could only throw up his hands in bafflement. Beguiled by the ruins' forbidding beauty, the esteemed Explorator touched one of the obelisks — and then it appeared. The creature... I had never seen the like of it before, a startling fact in and of itself. It was as if someone had dipped a human skeleton in molten metal and then compelled it to move. I shudder to recall that monster. It did not understand commands in Gothic, nor could my Enginseer manage to communicate with the thing in any of the Techna-Lingua dialects. We thought, naively, that the creature was a rare kind of servitor or automaton. The only thing disgorged by its vox-synths was "yergmek." Merciful God-Emperor, it was only by His will that I returned to the flagship. The Tech-Priest, may the Master of Mankind receive him, tried both to seize control of the creature's governing systems and to stop it with his tech-miracles — all in vain. I watched as my faithful servants perished one by one. I remember the chilling horror that crept over me as I realised my helplessness. As if I were watching doom itself draw nearer and nearer, its metal skull heralding my destruction. But I am a Rogue Trader. I am Seberian von Valancius! By the God-Emperor's covenant and by His will, it is my duty to brave the unknown and to subjugate the Galaxy to the Golden Throne. And when the thing crashed to the floor with a clang, it was followed by heresy of the highest order. The construct simply vanished in a flash of green, robbing me of my lawful right to claim the trophy. That was the truly devastating loss, even more so than the loss of my closest servants..."

traits.locale_text:
Cette page extraite d'un journal a été soigneusement découpée et restaurée.{br}
« Mais ce que j'ai découvert sur cet amas de poussière oublié de tous... À notre arrivée, les auspex du vaisseau ont détecté la présence de ruines non identifiées. Intrigués, mon entourage et moi-même sommes descendus à la surface de ce monde hostile. Quel défi la galaxie me réservait-elle cette fois-ci ? Quel noble exploit pourrais-je accomplir en Son nom et en celui de la dynastie ? Quels trésors m'attendaient, prêts à servir l'humanité et la maison von Valancius ? Jamais encore je n'avais posé les yeux sur de tels édifices. Des obélisques d'un noir mat à la surface parfaitement lisse, gravés de glyphes phosphorescents dans une langue qui m'était inconnue. Même mon indispensable expert en linguistique en est resté sans voix. Envoûté par la beauté menaçante des ruines, l'honorable Explorator a touché l'un des monolithes, et c'est alors qu'elle est apparue. La créature... Un spécimen tel que je n'en avais jamais vu de toute ma vie, et ce n'est pas peu dire. On aurait cru que quelqu'un avait trempé un squelette humain dans du métal en fusion avant de le forcer à se mouvoir. Je frémis au seul souvenir de ce monstre. Il ne comprenait pas les ordres en gothique, pas plus que les nombreux dialectes de la Techna-Lingua employés par mon technaugure. Nous avons naïvement cru qu'il s'agissait d'un modèle rare de servitor ou d'automate. "Yergmek", tel était le seul mot proféré par ses synthétiseurs-vox. C'est uniquement grâce à la volonté de notre miséricordieux Empereur-Dieu que j'ai pu regagner vivant le vaisseau amiral. Le technoprêtre, le Maître de l'Humanité ait son âme, a vainement tenté de prendre le contrôle des systèmes principaux de la créature et de l'arrêter à l'aide de ses miracles technologiques. J'ai assisté impuissant à la mort de tous mes fidèles serviteurs. Je me souviens encore du frisson d'horreur qui m'a saisi quand j'ai compris à quel point j'étais démuni. Comme si je regardais la mort se rapprocher lentement mais sûrement, son crâne de métal annonçant ma destruction imminente. Sauf que je suis un libre-marchand. L'auguste représentant de la maison von Valancius ! Par la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu et le pacte qui nous lie, il m'incombe de braver l'inconnu et de soumettre la galaxie tout entière à l'autorité du Trône d'Or. Plus tard, quand la chose s'est effondrée dans un fracas assourdissant, j'ai été le témoin et la victime d'une hérésie de la pire espèce. L'automate s'est volatilisé dans un éclair de lumière verte, me privant de mon droit légitime à récupérer ce trophée arraché de haute lutte. Ce fut pour moi une perte plus tragique encore que celle de mes plus proches serviteurs... »

languages.text:
Diese Seite aus einem Tagebuch wurde sorgsam ausgeschnitten und restauriert.{br}
"... Aber was mir auf diesem vergessenen Klumpen Dreck begegnete ... Als wir ankamen, verkündeten die Auspizien des Schiffs das Vorhandensein irgendwelcher Ruinen. Interessiert stiegen mein Gefolge und ich zur Oberfläche der toten Welt hinab. Welche Herausforderung hielt die Galaxie diesmal für mich bereit? Welche Großtat würde ich in Seinem Namen und im Namen der Dynastie vollbringen? Welche Schätze erwarteten mich, bereit für das Wohl der Menschheit und des Hauses Valancius? Nie zuvor hatte ich derartige Gebäude erblickt. Mattschwarze, polierte Obelisken mit leuchtend grünen Inschriften in einer Sprache, die mir fremd war. Sogar mein unverzichtbares Sprachgenie konnte nur verwirrt die Arme erheben. Fasziniert von der verbotenen Schönheit der Ruinen, berührte der geschätzte Explorator einen der Obelisken – und dann erschien sie. Die Kreatur ... Ich hatte dergleichen noch nie gesehen, was in sich selbst bereits erstaunlich war. Als hätte jemand ein menschliches Skelett in geschmolzenes Metall getaucht und ihm dann befohlen, sich zu bewegen. Mich schaudert, wenn ich an das Monster denke. Es verstand keine Befehle auf Gotisch, und auch mein Maschinenseher konnte in keinem Dialekt der Lingua technis mit dem Ding kommunizieren. Wir dachten in unserer Naivität, die Kreatur wäre ein seltener Servitor oder ein Automat. Das Einzige, was sein Vox-Synth hervorbrachte, war "Yergmek". Gnädiger Gottimperator, ich verdanke es nur Seinem Willen, dass ich zum Flaggschiff zurückkehrte. Der Techpriester, möge der Herr der Menschheit ihn aufnehmen, versuchte, die Befehlssysteme der Kreatur zu übernehmen und sie mit seinen Tech-Wundern aufzuhalten – alles vergebens. Ich sah zu, wie meine getreuen Diener der Reihe nach starben. Ich erinnere mich an das kalte Grauen, das mich überkam, als ich meine Hilflosigkeit realisierte. Als sähe ich zu, wie der Untergang selbst immer näher kam, kündigte sein Metallschädel meine Vernichtung an. Aber ich bin ein Freihändler. Ich bin Seberian von Valancius! Beim Pakt des Gottimperators und Seinem Willen, es ist meine Pflicht, dem Unbekannten zu trotzen und die Galaxie dem Goldenen Thron zu unterwerfen. Und als das Ding klirrend zu Boden stürzte, folgte ihm eine Ketzerei höchsten Grades. Das Konstrukt löste sich einfach in einem grünen Blitz auf und beraubte mich meines gesetzmäßigen Anrechts auf eine Trophäe. Ein wahrlich verheerender Verlust, schlimmer noch als der Verlust meiner engsten Diener ..."
languages.original_text:
This page from someone's diary has been neatly cut out and restored.{br}
"...But that which I encountered on this forgotten lump of dirt... When we arrived, the ship's auspexes revealed the presence of some kind of ruins. Intrigued, my retinue and I descended to the surface of the dead world. What challenge had the galaxy prepared for me this time? What grand deed might I perform in His name and the name of the dynasty? What treasures awaited me, ready to serve Humanity and House von Valancius? Never before had I set eyes upon such buildings. Matte-black, polished obelisks, inscribed with glowing green glyphs of a language unknown to me. Even my indispensable linguist savant could only throw up his hands in bafflement. Beguiled by the ruins' forbidding beauty, the esteemed Explorator touched one of the obelisks — and then it appeared. The creature... I had never seen the like of it before, a startling fact in and of itself. It was as if someone had dipped a human skeleton in molten metal and then compelled it to move. I shudder to recall that monster. It did not understand commands in Gothic, nor could my Enginseer manage to communicate with the thing in any of the Techna-Lingua dialects. We thought, naively, that the creature was a rare kind of servitor or automaton. The only thing disgorged by its vox-synths was "yergmek." Merciful God-Emperor, it was only by His will that I returned to the flagship. The Tech-Priest, may the Master of Mankind receive him, tried both to seize control of the creature's governing systems and to stop it with his tech-miracles — all in vain. I watched as my faithful servants perished one by one. I remember the chilling horror that crept over me as I realised my helplessness. As if I were watching doom itself draw nearer and nearer, its metal skull heralding my destruction. But I am a Rogue Trader. I am Seberian von Valancius! By the God-Emperor's covenant and by His will, it is my duty to brave the unknown and to subjugate the Galaxy to the Golden Throne. And when the thing crashed to the floor with a clang, it was followed by heresy of the highest order. The construct simply vanished in a flash of green, robbing me of my lawful right to claim the trophy. That was the truly devastating loss, even more so than the loss of my closest servants..."
